violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2025

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as produce) in the refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025
One kitchen ceiling light panel is in poor repair (cracked). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024
Food observed stored on shelves that are not at least 6 inches above the floor. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the dry storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024

The sink used for food preparation currently has an air break, and is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2025
